stateDiagram-v2
    state "Moving Forward" as s1
    state "Standing Still" as s2
    [*] --> s1
    s1 --> s2
---
┌────────────────┐
│      (*)       │
└────────┬───────┘
         │
┌────────▼───────┐
│ Moving Forward │
└────────┬───────┘
         │
┌────────▼───────┐
│ Standing Still │
└────────────────┘
